diagrams.title: Peterson's Solution Flow
diagrams.description: Shows how two processes coordinate entry to critical section using flag and turn variables
diagrams.purpose: Understanding software-based mutual exclusion for two processes

diagrams.title: Semaphore Operations
diagrams.description: Visual representation of wait() and signal() operations on a semaphore
elements: wait() arrow: decrement if > 0, else block
signal() arrow: increment and wake if blocked
diagrams.purpose: Understanding atomic semaphore operations and blocking behavior

diagrams.title: Producer-Consumer with Semaphores
diagrams.description: Bounded buffer with producer, consumer, and three semaphores

diagrams.title: Deadlock Detection Resource Allocation Graph
diagrams.description: Resource allocation graph showing deadlock state with cycle
elements: Cycle in graph indicates potential deadlock
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how to detect deadlocks visually
